input.title: Developer Docs RAG Plan
input.problem_summary: A small team wants RAG over API docs and SDK guides.
assumptions: Corpus is stable and mostly structured
The team can label a small evaluation set

Phase 0: Create benchmark scenarios from common API questions

rationale: 这是稳定结构化语料的新系统，第一步应建立评测集来约束后续改动。
